summary: Comprehensive testing of Universal Privacy Layer v3 - 4-chain mainnet deployment. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend fully verified: landing page, chain badge dropdown, chain selector navbar, back button navigation, and chain status page all working correctly.

critical.issue: KeyError 500: config['uniswap_router'] - CHAIN_CONFIG does not have 'uniswap_router' key. Returns {"detail":"'uniswap_router'"} for all chains.
critical.fix: Add 'uniswap_router': None to each chain in CHAIN_CONFIG, or use .get('uniswap_router') in the response

issues: 'Deployed on 4 chains' shows only 3 dots visually in some screen widths - 4th dot may be clipped

GET /api/chains → all 4 chains have stealth_registry=0xf2E7A6734E58774A8417c176AaE3898667699Ff4

Chain badge dropdown: Shows NON-EVM (ROADMAP) - Solana, Bitcoin, Sui, Hyperliquid

Dashboard: Chain selector shows COMING SOON section (BNB Chain, Avalanche)

action_items: Fix /api/swap/quote KeyError: add 'uniswap_router': None to CHAIN_CONFIG for all 4 chains, or use config.get('uniswap_router') in the response dict
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 340: config['uniswap_router'] KeyError - CHAIN_CONFIG missing uniswap_router key. Fix: use config.get('uniswap_router') or add the key to CHAIN_CONFIG
server.py: SwapQuoteRequest model defaults chain to 'base_sepolia' (old testnet name) - should default to 'base'
server.py: StealthAddressRequest model defaults chain to 'ethereum_sepolia' - should default to 'base' or a valid mainnet chain

success_rate.backend: 94% (17/18 endpoints tested pass; /api/swap/quote returns 500 due to KeyError)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 chains (Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism) verified live on backend and frontend. One backend bug: /api/swap/quote returns 500 due to missing 'uniswap_router' key in CHAIN_CONFIG. Frontend fully working: landing page, chain badge/dropdown, chain selector navbar, back button (ArrowLeft + 'Back' text), and chain status page all verified with mock wallet injection. Pytest plugin conflict exists for web3 pytest-ethereum - need pytest.ini with 'p no:pytest_ethereum' in tests directory to run pytest.

swap_quote_500.root_cause: server.py line 340: response dict includes 'uniswap_router': config['uniswap_router'] but CHAIN_CONFIG for mainnet chains only has keys: name, chain_id, rpc_url, explorer, symbol, color, weth, usdc. The uniswap_router key was present in testnet config but missing from mainnet config.
swap_quote_500.fix: Change line 340 from config['uniswap_router'] to config.get('uniswap_router'), OR add 'uniswap_router': None to all 4 mainnet chain configs in CHAIN_CONFIG
